items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.

items.title: Israelis war-weary but most oppose Iran ceasefire, poll suggests
items.summary: The vast majority did not believe Hezbollah or Iran had been severely weakened by weeks of Israeli and US attacks, according to the poll.

items.title: Italian PM condemns ally Trump over 'unacceptable' Pope criticism
items.summary: Italy's prime minister and the US president are close allies, but Trump has refused to apologise to the "very weak" Pope Leo XIV.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced

items.title: 川普稱伊朗來電盼達協議　提及習近平希望戰爭結束
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天在白宮表示，伊朗主動來電希望達成協議，同時他還提到尚未跟中國國家主席習近平對話，但習近平希望看到伊朗戰爭結束。  美國有線電視新聞網（CNN）報導，川普表示美國政府今晨接獲「...…

items.title: 英相施凱爾：英法擬本週開峰會　促開通荷莫茲海峽
items.summary: 英國首相施凱爾今天表示，本週他將與法國總統馬克宏（Emmanuel Macron）召開領袖峰會，與各國討論促成荷莫茲海峽重新開通、結束中東地區衝突的行動方案。  施凱爾（Keir Starm...…

items.title: 馬格雅矢言修憲打貪迎新局　盼5/5就任匈牙利總理
